macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: FTSE 100 Falls 0.5% as Oil Prices Climb Above $100
items.summary: The FTSE 100 extended Thursday's decline on Friday as crude oil prices rebounded above $100 per barrel amid renewed Middle East tensions, while UK household spending growth eased to 0.5% and fixed investments contracted by 1.9%.

items.title: US Stock Futures Edge Higher Ahead of Inflation Data and Fed Commentary
items.summary: US equity futures are trading modestly higher as markets await key inflation data releases and fresh commentary from Federal Reserve officials.

items.title: S&P 500 Down 0.5% on Iran Negotiations Uncertainty and Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: The S&P 500 declined 0.5% following reports of new Iranian requirements for ships in the Strait of Hormuz and conflicting signals on US-Iran deal progress, with oil volatility driving market swings.

items.title: Tech Stocks Drive Global Markets to New Highs Despite Middle East Concerns
items.summary: Stock markets in Taiwan, Korea, Japan, and the US reached new highs this week, with semiconductor and AI-related companies leading gains as investors pursue a 'long AI, short macro' strategy.

items.title: RBA Minutes Signal Further Tightening as Inflation Could Reach 5% if Oil Stays Near $100
items.summary: Reserve Bank of Australia officials indicated expectations for continued rate increases, warning that inflation could spike to 5% in Q2 if crude oil prices remain elevated near $100 per barrel.

items.title: Dollar Strengthens as US-Iran Deal Optimism Fades Amid Geopolitical Escalation
items.summary: The US dollar has risen as hopes for an imminent US-Iran agreement have diminished following US strikes in the Strait of Hormuz area and Iranian missile responses.

items.title: South Korean Won Drops 1.24% Amid Currency Market Volatility
items.summary: The South Korean Won was among the top currency losers, declining 1.24% as global risk sentiment shifted.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Market Plunges 3.8% Amid US-Iran Military Tensions
items.summary: The cryptocurrency market fell nearly 4% on May 8 as renewed U.S.-Iran military tensions triggered a broad risk-off selloff. Bitcoin slipped below $77,000 while Ethereum dropped over 6%, with more than $344 million in long liquidations accelerating downside pressure.

items.title: Over $344 Million in Crypto Long Liquidations in 24 Hours
items.summary: The cryptocurrency derivatives market experienced a massive wave of liquidations as falling prices forced leveraged traders out of their positions. More than 110,000 traders were liquidated with $252 million in long liquidations, intensifying downside momentum across digital assets.

items.title: Crypto Fear and Greed Index Falls to 38 as Geopolitical Uncertainty Rises
items.summary: Investor sentiment deteriorated sharply with the Crypto Fear and Greed Index falling 9 points to 38, returning to fear territory as geopolitical tensions and rising volatility pushed traders toward defensive positions.

items.title: JPMorgan, Ripple, Ondo Complete First Cross-Border Tokenized Treasury Settlement
items.summary: JPMorgan, Ripple, Mastercard, and Ondo Finance completed a pilot transaction involving tokenized treasuries on the XRP Ledger, marking significant progress in cross-border settlement tokenization.

items.title: Bullish Launches Tokenized BLSH Shares on Solana After $4.2B Acquisition
items.summary: Following its $4.2 billion acquisition of Equiniti, Bullish announced plans to tokenize its entire equity structure on the Solana blockchain, putting 151 million shares on-chain.

items.title: Senate Banking Committee to Vote on CLARITY Act Crypto Bill
items.summary: The Senate Banking Committee is scheduled to markup the CLARITY Act, a significant cryptocurrency regulatory bill, with the vote expected by Friday.

items.title: Bitwise Unveils Tokenized Crypto Carry Fund for BTC, ETH, XRP Yields
items.summary: Crypto ETF issuer Bitwise launched a Crypto Carry Fund targeting yields from the difference between spot and futures prices of major cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and XRP.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: TikTok Rolls Back AI Video Descriptions in US After Absurd Errors
items.summary: TikTok has quietly discontinued its experimental AI-powered video description feature in the US after it generated bizarre and inaccurate captions that went viral. The rollback highlights challenges in deploying AI for social media content interpretation.

items.title: White House Considers Pre-Release Vetting for Advanced AI Models
items.summary: The White House is discussing executive actions to establish a government vetting process for advanced AI models before public release, with briefings reported by Politico and The New York Times. National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett mentioned studying a potential executive order.

items.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-Realtime-2 with Advanced Voice Reasoning and Translation
items.summary: OpenAI has added three new realtime audio models to its API: GPT-Realtime-2 for GPT-5-class voice reasoning, GPT-Realtime-Translate, and GPT-Realtime-Whisper, enabling natural conversations and harder requests.

items.title: Tether Releases QVAC MedPsy Open-Source Medical AI Models for Smartphones
items.summary: Tether's AI Research Group launched QVAC Psy and QVAC MedPsy models (1.7B and 4B parameters) for edge devices like phones, with strong benchmark scores outperforming referenced Google models in medical tasks.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: New Realistic FPS Game 'Bodycam' Launches in Early Access on Steam
items.summary: A highly realistic FPS game described as 'disturbingly real' has entered early access exclusively on Steam, with its release on May 12th, 2026, highlighted in a recent video with 1.8K views.

items.title: Racing Master Released with Unreal Engine 4 and Code Masters Collaboration
items.summary: Racing Master, a new racing game featuring advanced customization, tuning, and racing mechanics, launched yesterday in collaboration with Code Masters, the developers behind F1 games.

items.title: Darkest Hours Announces Collaboration with Die of Death on Roblox
items.summary: Darkest Hours is set to collaborate with the Roblox game Die of Death, adding characters Pursuer and Harkin, as part of updates to the biggest recent patch.

items.title: Dota 2 Receives Meta Update 7.41c, Hailed as Most Balanced Game
items.summary: Dota 2's latest meta update 7.41c has been analyzed by a professional, reinforcing its reputation as the most balanced game ever made over the past 8 years.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
